continuity.arc_goal: Build personal health intelligence via iMessage with automated daily sync of health data across multiple sources (Withings, Apple Health, Oura, Evernote) and enable cross-pillar correlation queries (HRV vs workout intensity, BP vs sleep, body fat% vs BP trend, sauna tags vs recovery metrics)

progress_update.summary: We completed the full health data hardening sprint and iOS automation end-to-end. Built 8 major themes: secrets rotation script (OpenAI/Telegram/Gmail credentials), iMessage test checklist (7 subcommands), HRV backfill (0→3138 rows in oura_daily), source-priority de-duplication consolidation, migration path tests (v0→v5), sync-status subcommand (reads all 4 pillars), State of Mind pillar (schema, importers, mood subcommand, agent wiring), and full iOS automation pipeline (Health Auto Export app + 2 Shortcuts + launchd WatchPaths watcher). iOS pipeline went through significant real-world discovery: LZFSE-compressed .hae files vs JSON, actual iCloud path, separate State of Mind automation. Everything is wired end-to-end and will run automatically at 6am daily.
progress_update.goal: Personal health intelligence via iMessage: automated daily sync of Apple Health data (steps, daylight, body metrics, workouts, State of Mind) into health.db alongside existing Withings/Oura pipelines. Agent answers cross-pillar correlation queries.
accomplished: health_db.py v5: added sync helpers (get/set_last_synced, maybe_mark_stale), backfill_daily_hrv(), state_of_mind table (schema version 5)
HRV backfill: 0→3138 oura_daily rows now have avg_hrv_rmssd populated from oura_sleep_sessions; oura-sync.py auto-refreshes on each sleep sync
Source-priority de-dup: consolidated get/set_last_synced helpers in health_db.py, extracted apple_health source guard to prevent double-import
Migration path tests: 6 tests covering v0→v5, v2→v5, v3→v5, v4→v5, idempotency, and version validation
sync-status subcommand: reads sync_state table, checks staleness (>2 days), tracks all 4 pillars (withings, apple_health, oura, evernote)
mood subcommand: queries state_of_mind table with --since and --kind filters
State of Mind pillar: schema (state_of_mind table), import paths (import-apple-health-json.py + import-apple-health.py XML), AGENTS.md Intent 14 (sync-status), Intent 15 (mood)
iOS automation: Health Auto Export app configured with 2 automations (Health DB export + State of Mind), 6am/6:05am Shortcuts, launchd WatchPaths watcher auto-imports both folders
import-apple-health-json.py: real JSON schema discovered (data.metrics for health, data.stateOfMind for mood), parser updated with actual field names
Code review findings: 3 bugs fixed (Withings resource key mismatch, HRV backfill NULL edge case, regex backreference in rotation script)
progress_update.now: Session complete. All code committed (commit 3d76bd3). iOS pipeline live and will run at 6am tomorrow. 4 WIP files are planning/doc artifacts not requiring commit.
next_steps: Verify 6am pipeline fires correctly: check ~/Library/Logs/ironclaw/health-watch.log tomorrow morning
Test iMessage queries using docs/tasks/main/imessage-test-checklist.md (all 7 subcommands: health, body-metrics, blood-pressure, workouts, activity, sync-status, mood)
First Apple Health XML export for historical State of Mind data: run import-apple-health.py --file export.xml with --debug to confirm HKStateOfMindSample MetadataEntry key names
Rotate container secrets: run scripts/rotate-container-secrets.sh with new OpenAI/Telegram/Gmail credentials
Run spectre:clean to lint and tidy up
constraints: health.db at schema version 5 — next schema change requires version 6 migration block
Withings/Oura tokens in macOS Keychain; container secrets (OpenAI, Telegram, Gmail) still in .env for Docker
Health Auto Export exports to iCloud Drive: Auto Export/Health DB export/HealthAutoExport-YYYY-MM-DD.json and Auto Export/State of Mind/HealthAutoExport-YYYY-MM-DD.json
State of Mind JSON uses data.stateOfMind (not data.metrics); fields: start, kind, valence, labels, associations
Terminal lacks Full Disk Access so cannot read iCloud Drive directly — launchd script unaffected
HKStateOfMindSample MetadataEntry key names unconfirmed for XML import path — first XML import will reveal via --debug
decisions: Health Auto Export chosen over manual XML for daily automation; State of Mind requires separate automation in the app
iOS Shortcut automations at 6:00am (Health DB export) and 6:05am (State of Mind) — 5-minute gap lets Jeff log State of Mind before export
launchd WatchPaths watches parent Auto Export/ folder, watcher script scans both subfolders
PRAGMA user_version framework for migrations — v0→v5 path tested with all intermediate steps
open_questions: HKStateOfMindSample MetadataEntry key names for XML importer — pending first real export.xml import
Should activity_daily gain an active_calories column? active_energy is in Health Auto Export JSON but no DB column yet
risks: 6am Shortcuts automation requires phone to be awake/unlocked — if phone is off it won't fire
iCloud Drive sync latency variable — watcher may fire before file is fully synced (JSON validation guard handles this)

context.wip_state: 4 untracked planning/doc files (bp_report, session logs, AGENTS.md minor edit)
context.session_arc: 11-session sprint on health-db multi-pillar system (Apr 26–30). S1 scoped health-db. S2 implemented phases 1-3 (SQLite, blood labs, Oura). S3 wrote 4 test files. S4 clean/test/evaluate, fixed 3 architecture issues, pushed. S5 scoped health_query.py (3 subcommands, 6 intents). S6 executed health_query.py: built all 3 subcommands, cost_summary.py, SKILL.md, 88 tests passing. S7 debugged live routing: fixed AGENTS.md Rule 6b enforcement, SKILL.md guardrails, skill config sync. S8 built BP pillar end-to-end (import, query, entry, tests), fixed 3 arch issues, 72 tests. S9 scoped multi-source data import and completed Withings integration (OAuth2, daily cron, 154 rows). S10 completed full system: Apple Health XML (all categories), Evernote ENEX parser, Oura tags, 5 new query subcommands, hardened security (Keychain, daily launchd, backup), fixed 2 bugs, 172 tests. S11 (current) finalized iOS automation end-to-end: Health Auto Export app + 2 Shortcuts + launchd watcher, HRV backfill (3138 rows), migration framework tests (v0→v5), sync-status + mood subcommands, State of Mind pillar, secrets rotation script, iMessage test checklist, 145 tests. System fully automated, wired, tested, deployed. 6am daily iOS sync live.
